problem id: 722b605b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(1)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  10001111 -> 11001111
  00000010 -> 10111111
  10110101 -> 11011011
  01101000 -> 11110110
  11000011 -> 01100111
  10000100 -> 01101111
  00111101 -> 11011110
  00010101 -> 11011111
  00000111 -> 10011111

query: 01111011
predicted answer: 00111101
